case_title: EL DORADO HOUSING CORPORATION vs. WARREN, GARY et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT WARREN, GARY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

M4/#504, COMM. SUE KAPLAN, CSR L NAJERA, CLK H HAMILTON 1400: CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. MARCO QUAZZO FOR PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT IN PROPRIA PERSONA. SETTLED, AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, TO BE REDUCED TO WRITING & FILED IN THE CLERK'S OFFICE. DEFENDANT TO VACATE 150 - 9TH ST. #303 BY 7-10-98. PLAINTIFF WILL WAIVE ALL RENT THROUGH 7-10-98. DEFENDANT AGREES TO KEEP ROOM IN SANITARY CONDITION. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES, PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY, UPON 24 HRS NOTICE, PLAINTIFF MAY MOVE EX PARTE FOR JUDGMENT
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF EL DORADO HOUSING CORPORATION WARREN, GARY
